rationale: Educ. Code §45.202 governs selection of school district depositories and is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 45.202. SELECTION OF DEPOSITORY. The school depository or depositories of every independent school district may be selected only as provided by this subchapter.
_note: Rule text concerns school depository selection, not property tax exemptions; no overlap with proposed change.
